order.autoRenewNotice: Kev sau npe yuav hloov tshiab tsis tu ncua txhua hli ntawm {cost} txog thaum tshem.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Los ntawm kev kuam lub thawv no, koj lees paub tias koj yuav cov khoom sau npe uas hloov tshiab tsis tu ncua thiab them rau daim credit card koj muab hnub no. Xa email rau: billing{'@'}interserver.net los tshem. Los ntawm kev nyem Txiav Txim, koj lees paub tias tau nyeem thiab pom zoo rau peb Cov Lus Cog Tseg thiab Txoj Cai Tiv Thaiv Kev Ceev Ntiag Tug.
